name: Ankur Heavy Dish Bowl With Inside Color And Print 27cm (3900ml)
description: Enhance your pet’s dining experience with the ANKUR Heavy Dish Bowl. It’s not just a feeding dish; it’s a stylish and practical addition to your pet’s daily routine. Key Features: Heavy-Duty Design: Crafted with a sturdy, heavy-duty base, this bowl resists tipping and sliding, even during enthusiastic feedings. Ideal for pets who tend to be a bit messy or energetic. Inside Color and Print: Featuring a vibrant interior color and charming prints, this bowl adds a splash of fun to your pet’s mealtime. Pet-Safe Materials: Made from high-quality, non-toxic materials, this bowl is designed with your pet’s health and safety in mind. Easy to Clean: The smooth surface of the bowl makes it easy to clean by hand or in the dishwasher, ensuring convenience for busy pet owners. Generous Capacity: With a 3900ml capacity, it’s perfect for larger pets or multiple servings, making it versatile for both meals and hydration.
